overall.description: Game engine footage showing a first-person perspective walking across a sandy field toward a large brick institutional building, then turning left to reveal and walk along a coastal beach toward a prominent sea stack rock formation. The scene features bright midday lighting with scattered clouds and includes on-screen movement controls indicating gameplay.

view transitions from building approach to coastal beach as the turn completes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves across a wide sandy field toward a large red brick building under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. Sparse forests line the distant horizon on both sides. As the camera approaches the building, it begins a left turn, transitioning the view toward the coastline and ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with sea stack formation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach toward the large sea stack rock formation in the distance

entered.detail: calm blue ocean stretching to the horizon with gentle waves
tall isolated rock formation rising from the water near the shore
rocky coastal cliffs with sparse vegetation extending along the shoreline
rippled sand texture leading down to the waterline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide coastal beach with calm ocean waters stretching to the horizon under a partly cloudy sky. A prominent sea stack rock formation rises from the water in the center distance. The camera continues walking forward along the sandy shore, with coastal cliffs visible to the right and the open ocean to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide inland field toward a sweeping coastal vista. It begins by moving across a sandy expanse toward a large red brick building under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds and distant forests. As the camera approaches the structure, it executes a smooth left turn, shifting the perspective away from the building and toward the ocean. The scene then opens onto a wide beach where the camera walks along the sandy shore, flanked by coastal cliffs to the right and calm waters to the left. This forward motion continues across the coastline, finally centering on a prominent sea stack rock formation rising from the water in the distance.
